original: Created in joint venture between JoyCo and Xenogen to help their scientists on important projects, Focus Pills give you a momentary sense of calm and emotionless insight. Reduces active lust, and grants a short-term bonus to Intelligence.

You pop a Focus Pill out of your pack and into your mouth. It’s completely tasteless, and all but dissolves in your mouth.\n\nAfter a moment’s wait, you start to feel a little calmer. You let out a breath you didn’t know you were holding, and focus in on the task at hand.
{var0}+{var1}+" swallows a focus pill to no effect.
context: <<POS:06424403>> <<VARS:var0=e.capitalA,var1=e.short>> output(e.capitalA+e.short+" swallows a focus pill to no effect.")
